name: teamsherrard-realtor
description: Team Sherrard's plug-and-play AI systems for real estate agents.

plugins.name: realtor-ai-brain
plugins.description: The Realtor AI Brain — one shared brain (the agent's identity + memory) that powers every skill: setup, market updates, listings, content, and Jarvis. Install once, set up once, and every tool already knows the agent.
